zh.Cockermouth, Cumberlandshire, England: 英國英格蘭波藍德考可爾姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Lucy於大約1276年出生在英國波藍德考可爾姆斯時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight53歲，母親Isabel de Bolteby18歲。她於1288年與Guiscard Charron在英國英格蘭波藍德考可爾姆斯結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1332年在英國諾圖波藍德霍頓享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Lucy于大约1276年出生在英国波藍德考可爾姆斯时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight53岁，母亲Isabel de Bolteby18岁。她于1288年与Guiscard Charron在英国英格兰波藍德考可爾姆斯结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1332年在英国諾圖波藍德霍頓享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Lucy was born about 1276, in Cockermouth, Cumberland, England, her father, Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight, was 53 and her mother, Isabel de Bolteby, was 18. She married Guiscard Charron in 1288, in Cockermouth, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1332, in Horton, Northumberland, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Lucy est née environ 1276, à Cockermouth, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Bolteby, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Guiscard Charron en 1288, à Cockermouth, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1332, à Horton, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Lucy um 1276 in Cockermouth, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight 53 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Bolteby 18. Sie hat 1288 in Cockermouth, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Guiscard Charron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1332 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Horton, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Lucy è nata il circa 1276 nel Cockermouth, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Bolteby, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Guiscard Charron nel 1288, nel Cockermouth, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1332, nel Horton, Northumberland, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Lucyが約1276年にイギリスクウンバーランドコッカーモウスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knightは53歳，母Isabel de Boltebyは18歳であった。1288年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドコッカーモウスでGuiscard Charronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1332年にイギリスノースウンバーランドホールトンで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Lucy(이)가 대략 1276년 영국 c벌랜드 콕모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Bolteby(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1288년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 콕모우스에서 Guiscard Charron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1332년 영국 노르스벌랜드 호르턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Lucy nasceu aproximadamente 1276, em Cockermouth, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Bolteby, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Guiscard Charron em 1288, em Cockermouth, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1332, em Horton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Lucy родилась около 1276 г. в местности коккирмоут, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Bolteby, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guiscard Charron в 1288 г. в местности коккирмоут, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1332 г. в местности хауртон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Lucy nació aproximadamente 1276, en Cockermouth, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas de Lucy, Knight, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Isabel de Bolteby, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Guiscard Charron en 1288, en Cockermouth, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1332, en Horton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
